entities.name: Bolt

evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: Gemini
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成：一个像疯狂科学家的模型，工作过程像过山车一样可怕（动不动想删除整个仪表板），但最终能设计出非常惊艳的东西。

evidence.quote: And basically what happens behind the scenes is we send the information the user uploaded along with the system prompt and any other augmentations the users decided to Gemini and we create a quiz.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Gemini 3 that just came out is unbelievable at UI.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So a lot of times, I'll split the plan into backend and front end, and then I'll have Gemini just read the plan and do the front end.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Slinging models like Gemini 3 for frontend.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I love that you've never written any code and you're just like, "Cool, use Gemini for this and Claude for this.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: And let's say Gemini is like a crazy scientist who's super artsy, super talented at designing, but if you sit next to it and watch it work, it's terrifying.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: This might be just my experience, but when I'm using Gemini within antigravity, which is Google's new competitor to Cursor, when it's writing code, you can see the steps it's taking and it's terrifying.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So the way there is a rollercoaster and very scary, but at the end of the day, Gemini is very good at design.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: Composer
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成：Cursor 里的一个速度极快的模型，非常适合用来快速执行写代码的任务。

evidence.quote: So Cursor has an amazing model called Composer, which is superfast.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So a lot of things that are not that complex, I'll use Composer.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So now I think we're going to do this with Cursor just because Composer is so freaking fast.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And Composer is ridiculously fast.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So now what we're going to do is we're going to run the app locally and we'll be able to see what Composer ended up building and we're going to see if anything else is needed on our end to maybe do some manual review.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: No, Composer like the one thing is it's just so, so blazing fast, keeps you in flow.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And then I'll do this with Composer say with, let's do it with Composer One.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Here, you can see how fast Composer is.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: Codex
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成：GPT 的代码模型，被想象成穿着连帽衫坐在黑屋子的最强程序员，不善沟通但能关上门两小时修好最难搞的 Bug。

evidence.quote: This tells Claude to start reviewing its own code, but what's even cooler is I have Codex as well as Cursor open.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: But what's even cooler and something that I'm really proud of is I will usually do multiple reviews and I'll have Codex, which is ChatGPT's competitor to Claude Code, as well as cursor open, and I will have each of them review the code.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: She's very opinionated, but also super collaborative, which is I think why I'm always drawn to Claude because I need to do so much learning and it's your dream, a very communicative, but very opinionated dev lead, but then there's also Codex.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So I use Codex 5.1 Max, whatever.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So Codex has a built-in code review that you can do, or I just like to say review all the code in this branch.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1
